<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
00002| import {
00003|   type Abi,
00004|   type Address,
00005|   type Hash,
00006|   type ContractFunctionName,
00007|   type ContractFunctionArgs,
00008|   encodeFunctionData,
00009| } from 'viem'
00010| import { useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt, useSwitchChain, useChainId } from 'wagmi'
00011| import { toast } from 'sonner'
00012| import { useWallet } from './useWallet'
00013| import { BlockchainError, ChainSwitchError } from '../lib/blockchain/types'
00014| 
00015| /**
00016|  * Parameters for writing to a contract
00017|  */
00018| export interface WriteContractParams<
00019|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00020|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00021| > {
00022|   /** Contract address to interact with */
00023|   contractAddress: Address
00024|   /** Chain ID for the transaction */
00025|   chainId: number
00026|   /** Contract ABI */
00027|   abi: TAbi
00028|   /** Function name to call */
00029|   functionName: TName
00030|   /** Function arguments */
00031|   args: ContractFunctionArgs<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable', TName>
00032|   /** ETH value to send (in wei) */
00033|   value?: bigint
00034| }
00035| 
00036| /**
00037|  * Transaction lifecycle status
00038|  */
00039| export type WriteStatus =
00040|   | 'idle'
00041|   | 'preparing'
00042|   | 'ready'
00043|   | 'switching-chain'
00044|   | 'pending'
00045|   | 'confirming'
00046|   | 'success'
00047|   | 'error'
00048| 
00049| /**
00050|  * Current state of the write transaction lifecycle
00051|  */
00052| export interface WriteLifecycleState {
00053|   /** Current status of the transaction */
00054|   status: WriteStatus
00055|   /** Whether any operation is in progress */
00056|   isLoading: boolean
00057|   /** Transaction hash once submitted */
00058|   txHash: Hash | null
00059|   /** Error if transaction failed */
00060|   error: Error | null
00061| }
00062| 
00063| /**
00064|  * Prepared transaction data
00065|  */
00066| export interface PreparedWrite {
00067|   /** Target contract address */
00068|   to: Address
00069|   /** Encoded function call data */
00070|   data: `0x${string}`
00071|   /** ETH value to send */
00072|   value?: bigint
00073|   /** Contract ABI (for reference) */
00074|   abi: Abi
00075|   /** Function name (for reference) */
00076|   functionName: string
00077|   /** Function arguments (for reference) */
00078|   args: readonly unknown[]
00079| }
00080| 
00081| /**
00082|  * Options for the write contract lifecycle hook
00083|  */
00084| export interface WriteContractOptions {
00085|   /** Callback when transaction succeeds */
00086|   onSuccess?: (txHash: Hash) => void
00087|   /** Callback when transaction fails */
00088|   onError?: (error: Error) => void
00089|   /** Custom success message for toast */
00090|   successMessage?: string
00091|   /** Custom error message for toast */
00092|   errorMessage?: string
00093| }
00094| 
00095| export interface UseWriteContractLifecycleReturn<
00096|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00097|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00098| > {
00099|   /** Transaction state */
00100|   state: WriteLifecycleState
00101|   /** Execute write */
00102|   write: <T extends TAbi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00103|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00104|   ) => Promise<void>
00105|   /** Reset state */
00106|   reset: () => void
00107|   /** Loading */
00108|   isLoading: boolean
00109|   /** Error */
00110|   error: Error | null
00111|   /** TX hash */
00112|   txHash: Hash | null
00113|   /** Status */
00114|   status: WriteStatus
00115|   /** Write params */
00116|   writeData: WriteContractParams<TAbi, TName> | null
00117| }
00118| 
00119| /**
00120|  * Manage contract write transaction lifecycle
00121|  * 
00122|  * @example
00123|  * ```typescript
00124|  * const { write, state } = useWriteContractLifecycle({
00125|  *   onSuccess: (txHash) => console.log('Success!', txHash),
00126|  *   successMessage: 'Transfer completed!'
00127|  * })
00128|  * 
00129|  * await write({
00130|  *   contractAddress: tokenAddress,
00131|  *   chainId: 8453,
00132|  *   abi: ERC20_ABI,
00133|  *   functionName: 'transfer',
00134|  *   args: [recipient, amount],
00135|  * })
00136|  * ```
00137|  */
00138| export function useWriteContractLifecycle<
00139|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00140|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00141| >(options: WriteContractOptions): UseWriteContractLifecycleReturn<TAbi, TName> {
00142|   const sleep = (ms: number) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
00143|   const scheduleDismiss = (id: string, ms: number) => { setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss(id), ms) }
00144|   const onSuccess = options.onSuccess
00145|   const onError = options.onError
00146|   const successMessage = options.successMessage || 'Transaction completed successfully!'
00147|   const errorMessage = options.errorMessage || 'Transaction failed. Please try again.'
00148| 
00149|   const { address, isConnected } = useWallet()
00150|   const currentChainId = useChainId()
00151|   const { switchChain } = useSwitchChain()
00152|   
00153|   const [writeData, setWriteData] = useState<WriteContractParams<TAbi, TName> | null>(null)
00154|   const [state, setState] = useState<WriteLifecycleState>({
00155|     status: 'idle',
00156|     isLoading: false,
00157|     txHash: null,
00158|     error: null,
00159|   })
00160| 
00161|   // Use refs to store callbacks to avoid including them in useEffect dependencies
00162|   const onSuccessRef = useRef(onSuccess)
00163|   const onErrorRef = useRef(onError)
00164|   const successMessageRef = useRef(successMessage)
00165|   const errorMessageRef = useRef(errorMessage)
00166| 
00167|   // Update refs when callbacks change
00168|   useEffect(() => {
00169|     onSuccessRef.current = onSuccess
00170|     onErrorRef.current = onError
00171|     successMessageRef.current = successMessage
00172|     errorMessageRef.current = errorMessage
00173|   }, [onSuccess, onError, successMessage, errorMessage])
00174| 
00175|   // Send the transaction
00176|   const {
00177|     sendTransaction,
00178|     data: sendData,
00179|     error: sendError,
00180|     isPending: isSending,
00181|   } = useSendTransaction()
00182| 
00183|   // Wait for transaction confirmation
00184|   const {
00185|     isLoading: isConfirming,
00186|     isSuccess,
00187|     error: confirmError,
00188|   } = useWaitForTransactionReceipt({
00189|     hash: sendData,
00190|   })
00191| 
00192|   /**
00193|    * Prepare write transaction by encoding function data
00194|    */
00195|   const prepareWrite = useCallback(async <T extends Abi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00196|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00197|   ): Promise<PreparedWrite> => {
00198|     try {
00199|       setState(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'preparing', isLoading: true }))
00200| 
00201|       // Check if function is payable
00202|       const fn = params.abi.find(
00203|         (item) => item.type === 'function' && item.name === params.functionName
00204|       )
00205|       
00206|       if (params.value && fn && 'stateMutability' in fn && fn.stateMutability !== 'payable') {
00207|         throw new Error(`Function ${params.functionName} is not payable but value was provided`)
00208|       }
00209| 
00210|       // Encode the function data
00211|       const data = encodeFunctionData({
00212|         abi: params.abi,
00213|         functionName: params.functionName,
00214|         args: params.args,
00215|       } as any)
00216| 
00217|       const preparedWrite: PreparedWrite = {
00218|         to: params.contractAddress,
00219|         data,
00220|         value: params.value,
00221|         abi: params.abi,
00222|         functionName: params.functionName as string,
00223|         args: params.args as readonly unknown[],
00224|       }
00225| 
00226|       setState(prev => ({ 
00227|         ...prev, 
00228|         status: 'ready', 
00229|         isLoading: false,
00230|       }))
00231| 
00232|       return preparedWrite
00233|     } catch (error) {
00234|       const errorObj = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error))
00235|       
00236|       setState({
00237|         status: 'error',
00238|         error: errorObj,
00239|         txHash: null,
00240|         isLoading: false,
00241|       })
00242|       
00243|       throw errorObj
00244|     }
00245|   }, [])
00246| 
00247|   /**
00248|    * Handle chain switching if needed
00249|    */
00250|   const handleChainSwitch = useCallback(async (targetChainId: number): Promise<void> => {
00251|     if (currentChainId === targetChainId) {
00252|       return
00253|     }
00254| 
00255|     try {
00256|       setState(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'switching-chain', isLoading: true }))
00257| 
00258|       switchChain({ chainId: targetChainId })
00259|       
00260|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch')
00261|       toast.success('Network switched successfully', { id: 'chain-switch-success' })
00262| 
00263|       // Give a small delay to ensure the chain switch is complete
00264|       await sleep(2000)
00265| 
00266|       // Fallback: ensure toasts are cleared after 5s (non-blocking)
00267|       scheduleDismiss('chain-switch-success', 5000)
00268|       scheduleDismiss('chain-switch', 5000)
00269| 
00270|     } catch (switchError) {
00271|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch')
00272|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch-success')
00273|       const errorMsg = 'Failed to switch network. Please switch manually.'
00274|       const chainError = new ChainSwitchError(currentChainId, targetChainId, switchError)
00275|       
00276|       toast.error(errorMsg)
00277|       setState({
00278|         status: 'error',
00279|         error: chainError,
00280|         txHash: null,
00281|         isLoading: false,
00282|       })
00283|       
00284|       throw chainError
00285|     }
00286|   }, [currentChainId, switchChain])
00287| 
00288|   /**
00289|    * Execute the prepared write transaction
00290|    */
00291|   const executePreparedWrite = useCallback(async (preparedWrite: PreparedWrite): Promise<void> => {
00292|     try {
00293|       sendTransaction({
00294|         to: preparedWrite.to,
00295|         data: preparedWrite.data,
00296|         value: preparedWrite.value,
00297|       })
00298|     } catch (error) {
00299|       const errorObj = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error))
00300|       const blockchainError = new BlockchainError('Transaction execution failed', 'TX_EXECUTION_ERROR', errorObj)
00301|       
00302|       setState({
00303|         status: 'error',
00304|         error: blockchainError,
00305|         txHash: null,
00306|         isLoading: false,
00307|       })
00308|       
00309|       throw blockchainError
00310|     }
00311|   }, [sendTransaction])
00312| 
00313|   // Update state based on transaction lifecycle
00314|   useEffect(() => {
00315|     if (sendError || confirmError) {
00316|       const error = sendError || confirmError
00317|       setState({
00318|         status: 'error',
00319|         error: error as Error,
00320|         txHash: sendData || null,
00321|         isLoading: false,
00322|       })
00323|       toast.dismiss('tx-pending')
00324|       toast.error(errorMessageRef.current)
00325|       setTimeout(() => { toast.dismiss('tx-confirming'); toast.dismiss('tx-pending') }, 5000)
00326|       onErrorRef.current?.(error as Error)
00327|     } else if (isSending) {
00328|       setState({
00329|         status: 'pending',
00330|         error: null,
00331|         txHash: null,
00332|         isLoading: true,
00333|       })
00334|       toast.loading('Please confirm the transaction in your wallet...', { id: 'tx-pending' })
00335|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-pending'), 5000)
00336|     } else if (isConfirming) {
00337|       setState({
00338|         status: 'confirming',
00339|         error: null,
00340|         txHash: sendData || null,
00341|         isLoading: true,
00342|       })
00343|       toast.dismiss('tx-pending')
00344|       toast.loading('Transaction submitted. Waiting for confirmation...', { id: 'tx-confirming' })
00345|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-confirming'), 5000)
00346|     } else if (isSuccess) {
00347|       setState({
00348|         status: 'success',
00349|         error: null,
00350|         txHash: sendData || null,
00351|         isLoading: false,
00352|       })
00353|       toast.dismiss('tx-confirming')
00354|       toast.success(successMessageRef.current, { id: 'tx-success' })
00355|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-success'), 5000)
00356|       onSuccessRef.current?.(sendData!)
00357|     }
00358|   }, [sendError, confirmError, isSending, isConfirming, isSuccess, sendData])
00359| 
00360|   /**
00361|    * Execute a write contract transaction with automatic preparation and chain switching
00362|    */
00363|   const write = useCallback(async <T extends TAbi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00364|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00365|   ): Promise<void> => {
00366|     if (!isConnected || !address) {
00367|       const error = new BlockchainError('Wallet not connected', 'WALLET_NOT_CONNECTED')
00368|       setState({
00369|         status: 'error',
00370|         error,
00371|         txHash: null,
00372|         isLoading: false,
00373|       })
00374|       toast.error('Please connect your wallet first', { duration: 5000 })
00375|       throw error
00376|     }
00377| 
00378|     try {
00379|       setWriteData(params as any)
00380|       
00381|       // Handle chain switching if needed
00382|       await handleChainSwitch(params.chainId)
00383|       
00384|       // Prepare the write transaction
00385|       const preparedWrite = await prepareWrite(params)
00386|       
00387|       // Execute the transaction
00388|       await executePreparedWrite(preparedWrite)
00389|     } catch (error) {
00390|       // Errors are already handled in the individual functions
00391|       console.error('Write contract execution failed:', error)
00392|     }
00393|   }, [isConnected, address, handleChainSwitch, prepareWrite, executePreparedWrite])
00394| 
00395|   /**
00396|    * Reset the write state
00397|    */
00398|   const reset = useCallback(() => {
00399|     setState({
00400|       status: 'idle',
00401|       error: null,
00402|       txHash: null,
00403|       isLoading: false,
00404|     })
00405|     setWriteData(null)
00406|   }, [])
00407| 
00408|   return {
00409|     state,
00410|     write,
00411|     reset,
00412|     isLoading: state.isLoading,
00413|     error: state.error,
00414|     txHash: state.txHash,
00415|     status: state.status,
00416|     writeData,
00417|   }
00418| }
</file>

metadata.preview:
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  type Abi,
  type Address,
  type Hash,
  type ContractFunctionName,
  type ContractFunctionArgs,
  encodeFunctionData,
} from 'viem'
import { useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt, useSwitchChain, useChainId } from 'wagmi'
import { toast } from 'sonner'
import { useWallet } from './useWallet'
import { BlockchainError, ChainSwitchError } from '../lib/blockchain/types'

/**
 * Parameters for writing to a contract
 */
export interface WriteContractParams<
  TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
  TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>

state.title: frontend/src/hooks/useWriteContractLifecycle.ts
